sources.expression:
$dbq->wpdb->get_results( "
				SHOW VARIABLES
				WHERE Variable_name IN ( '" . implode( "', '", array_keys( $mysql_vars ) ) . "' )
			" )

sinks.expression:
printf( '

Dependencies for Query Monitor need to be installed. Run composer install --no-dev from the %s directory.

', esc_html( dirname( dirname( __FILE__ ) ) ) )

$dbq->wpdb->get_results( "
				SHOW VARIABLES
				WHERE Variable_name IN ( '" . implode( "', '", array_keys( $mysql_vars ) ) . "' )
			" )

printf(
			'<div id="qm-fatal" data-qm-message="%1$s" data-qm-file="%2$s" data-qm-line="%3$d">',
			esc_attr( $e['message'] ),
			esc_attr( QM_Util::standard_dir( $e['file'], '' ) ),
			intval( $e['line'] )
		)

printf( '

%1$s
in %2$s on line %3$d

', nl2br( esc_html( $e['message'] ), false ), esc_html( $e['file'] ), intval( $e['line'] ) )

printf(
			'<div class="qm" id="%1$s" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="%1$s-caption" tabindex="-1">' . "\n",
			esc_attr( $id )
		)

printf(
			'<div class="qm qm-non-tabular" id="%1$s" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="%1$s-caption" tabindex="-1">' . "\n",
			esc_attr( $id )
		)

printf(
			'<div class="qm qm-debug-bar" id="%1$s" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="%1$s-caption" tabindex="-1">' . "\n",
			esc_attr( $id )
		)

printf( // WPCS: XSS ok.
						'<tr data-qm-subject="%s" %s>',
						esc_attr( $subject ),
						$attr
					)
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)
